title: The Thrill Is Gone
why_this_song: The Thrill Is Gone by B.B. King (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You know you done me wrong, baby
Oh, the thrill is gone, baby
Someday, I know I'll be over it all, baby

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "thrill" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "thrill" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh, the thrill is gone, baby

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Thrill Is Gone" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Thrill Is Gone" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Thrill Is Gone" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Thrill Is Gone" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "The Thrill Is Gone" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "The Thrill Is Gone"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Thrill Is Gone" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Thrill Is Gone", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The Thrill Is Gone" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The Thrill Is Gone" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
